hero.description: piplos.dev is an engineering-first studio building web applications, mobile apps and backend systems for startups and enterprises. Clean code. Real delivery.

items.title: Web Applications
items.description: Complex SPAs, dashboards, admin panels and enterprise platforms. Built with modern frameworks, clean architecture and performance in mind.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Performance-first approach, seamless UX and full App Store / Play Market deployment.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Scalable microservices, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, real-time systems and data pipelines. Built to handle growth from day one.

items.title: DevOps & Cloud
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, cloud infrastructure and monitoring. We set up systems that deploy themselves and scale automatically.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We dig into your goals, constraints and technical requirements before writing a single line of code.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.description: System design, tech stack selection, and a clear roadmap agreed upon before development starts.

steps.title: Build & Iterate
steps.description: Agile sprints with weekly demos. You see progress, give feedback, and stay in control throughout.

steps.title: Ship & Support
steps.description: Deployment, monitoring setup, and ongoing support. We stay with you after launch.

cta.title: Ready to build something great?
cta.description: Tell us about your project. We'll get back within 24 hours with a plan and an estimate.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.cta_sub: Tell us about your idea — we'll get back within 24 hours with a plan and estimate.
portfolio.description: 120+ projects delivered across web, mobile, SaaS, fintech and enterprise software.

order.title: Start a Project
order.success_text: We'll review your project and get back to you within 24 hours.
promises: 24h response — we review every brief personally
Free estimate — detailed scope and cost breakdown
No lock-in — you own all code and infrastructure
Fixed-price or T&M — your preferred model
NDA on request — before any discussion

footer.tagline: Engineering-first software development studio. Part of Piplos Media Group.
